title: Cooking Basics
descLong: Become a beginner cook with our short course, learn basic hygine, knife skills, and food preparation techniques.

title: Pro Gaming
descLong: Learn how to engage and play with this couse designed to bring you to the heights of professional gaming.

title: Woodworking 101
descShort: Learn to the basics of hand-tool woodworking.
descLong: Safely learn the basics of working with hand tools to manipulate and shape wood. Properly learn to identify the properties of different species and gain hands-on experience with tool sharpening and maintenance.

title: Watercolour Painting
descShort: Join us as we paint with watercolours.
descLong: From beginner to expert, all are welcome to come and join us as we discover and experiment with watercolour painting. Learn new watercolour techniques or just come to socialise, we are an inclusive class aimed at all skill ranges.
